ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Operation type during the deployment */,
  "station" TEXT /* Station identifier where the deployment took place */,
  "cast" INTEGER /* Cast number for the deployment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the associated project */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the deployment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the deployment */,
  "start_location_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the start location */,
  "start_location_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the start location */,
  "end_location_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the end location */,
  "end_location_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the end location */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of water at the deployment site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the deployment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the deployment */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the deployment */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the deployment */,
  "depth_range" TEXT /* Range of depths covered during the deployment */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the overall data quality of the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project objectives */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL for the project's website or documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deployment using this instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., valid, expired) */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* History of maintenance and repairs */,
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_instrument_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_type_id") REFERENCES instrument_types ("instrument_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the deployment associated with the measurement */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being measured (e.g., temperature, salinity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time at which the measurement was taken */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty or error margin of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., m/s, °C) */,
  "depth_at_measurement" REAL /* Depth at which the measurement was taken */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the measurement (e.g., valid, suspect, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the research station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., fixed, mobile) */,
  "facility_manager" TEXT /* Name of the facility manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the station was established */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the deployment */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "data_volume" REAL /* Volume of data accessed in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement being assessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the measurement (e.g., valid, suspect, invalid) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality of the measurement */,
  "quality_reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the data quality */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the data quality was reviewed */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the quality reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_types" (
  "cast_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast type */,
  "cast_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cast type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth at the location */,
  "water_type" TEXT /* Type of water (e.g., saltwater, freshwater) */,
  "last_measured" TEXT /* Date when the location was last measured */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument type */,
  "calibration_requirements" TEXT /* Calibration requirements for the instrument type */,
  "maintenance_requirements" TEXT /* Maintenance requirements for the instrument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument to which this sensor is attached */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., valid, expired) */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of measurements the sensor can handle */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., operational, malfunctioning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
